The fonts in this directory are redistributed under the
[SIL Open Font License 1.1](https://openfontlicense.org/open-font-license-official-text/):

|---|---|---|
| Space Grotesk | © 2020 Florian Karsten | https://github.com/floriankarsten/space-grotesk |
| JetBrains Mono | © 2020 JetBrains s.r.o. | https://github.com/JetBrains/JetBrainsMono |

They are not covered by this repository's MIT license; see each project for the
full OFL text and reserved font names.
